vocab.meaning: khiếu trồng cây, mát tay chăm sóc cây cối
vocab.example: I’ve always envied those with a green thumb, as I struggle to keep even a simple succulent alive.

vocab.meaning: các hoạt động theo đuổi đam mê làm vườn
vocab.example: Lately, I’ve taken up horticultural pursuits to add some vibrancy and life to my apartment.
For a beginner like me, a low-maintenance cactus is the ideal choice for indoor greenery.

vocab.meaning: niềm yêu thích về thực vật học
vocab.example: My botanical interest was sparked when I received a beautiful orchid as a housewarming gift.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác đạt được thành tựu
vocab.example: Watching a tiny seed sprout and grow into a healthy plant gives me a profound sense of accomplishment.
I decided to keep a snake plant in my bedroom primarily because of its ability to purify the air.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Indoor plants not only improve my mood but also enhance the aesthetic appeal of my living space.
I felt quite dejected when I noticed my favorite fern was withering despite my best efforts to revive it.
The lush indoor foliage provides a soothing atmosphere, helping me de-stress after a long day at work.

vocab.meaning: có tính trị liệu, giúp thư giãn
vocab.example: I find the act of watering and pruning my plants to be quite therapeutic and grounding.
